titleStmt.title: SII 4.681: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 681. (A.R. No. 231 of 1892). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
¿ Asti śrīvelanāṁṭigoṁkanṛpati¨rbhbhūpālacūḍāma
ṇiḥ krīḍālōḍitagauḍalāṭakaṭakō rājēṁdracōḍātmajaḥ [.]
pratya¨rtthikṣitipāṁ didhakṣuriva yasyōccaiḥ pratāpānalaḥ
kāṁtācētasi jṛṁbhatē nivasatastatrāpi rātriṁdivaṁ [. 1*] bhūbhū
ṣaṇō yīvanikaṁḍravāṭi kuṟuṁggalugrāmavibhōssuputraḥ .
pātrassatāmāytamanāyakasya śrīḍāmalūriprabhu
rānatāriḥ [. 2*] Amātyakommaḥ pratipadya tasmādamātyala
kṣmīṁ śaśalakṣmakāṁtiḥ . narēṁdrasūnō¨rnnamitārivīrādguru
¨rggarīyāniva bhāti jiṣṇōḥ [. 3*] śākābdē śarata¨rkkanīradapathaśvē
tāṁśubhissaṁyutē śrīnādiṁḍlanivāsinē bhagavatē lōkatra
yasvāminē . mūlasthānabhavāya dīpakamadānnityōdi
taḥ kommanāmātyassa¨rvvajanāvalaṁbanakarassaujanyaratnā
karaḥ [. 4*] ¿ svasti śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1065 gunēṁṭi viṣusaṁkrāṁ
ttinimittamuna śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara velanāṁṭikulō
ttuṁgacōḍagoṁkarājuna kiṣṭabhrityuṁḍaina ḍāmalūri komma
4) The rest of the inscription is lost.

yanāyakuṁḍu nādiṁḍla śrīmūlasthānamahādēvara kakhaṁḍa
va¨rttidīpaṁbuna kiccina goṟiyalu 55 . vīniṁ jēkoni yiṁdu
la yācakamārebōyu koḍuku nāre dana putrānupau
traka mācaṁdrā¨rkkamu nitya māneṁḍu neyi Ī dīpaṁbunakuṁ bō
yaṁgalavāṁḍu . Ī nārebōyuniki nūṁcinipāṭaṁ beṭṭina polamu kha 1 ¿
Digital edition of SII 4.681 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
